evals.prompt: I need to chat with Grok 4 and ask it to explain quantum computing in simple terms. Save the response to .grok-resources folder.
evals.expected_output: Should execute grok_chat.py script with appropriate parameters, get response from Grok 4, and save to .grok-resources/chat/ folder

evals.prompt: Generate 3 images of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night with neon lights using Grok Imagine Fast. I want them in 1024x1024 size.
evals.expected_output: Should execute grok_image.py with grok-imagine-1.0-fast model, n=3, appropriate prompt, and save images to .grok-resources/images/

evals.prompt: Create a 10-second video of a cat walking through a cyberpunk street in 16:9 aspect ratio with high quality.
evals.expected_output: Should execute grok_video.py with appropriate parameters, generate video, download it, and save to .grok-resources/videos/
